data.name: Basic Analysis
data.summary: Flexible pipeline extracting information from neural + behavioral recordings (2P calcium imaging). Research goal: intrinsic activity in hippocampus CA3 in mice, in darkness, no task. Python 3.10.19 + uv. Data on F:\Experiments\Steffen\Intrinsic_Imaging (32 animals, 525 sessions). Importable package basic_analysis/ + Flask web app app/.

data.title: Restructure src/ into basic_analysis/ package + Flask app/
data.rationale: Importable package basic_analysis/ (analysis, io, pipeline, preprocessing, video, viz, cli, events, simulation) replaces flat src/; web UI is a Flask application-factory app/ with blueprints + services run via 'python -m app.run'.

data.title: Vendor MaxEnt (Ising / avalanche criticality) into basic-analysis
data.rationale: Pairwise maximum-entropy + avalanche/criticality moved from the sibling MaxEnt repo into basic_analysis/analysis/maxent (+viz/cli/slurm). basic-analysis HDF5 store is canonical (dropped MaxEnt's duplicate stores); single configs/pipeline.yaml maxent: section; PyQt6 GUI replaced by a Flask blueprint. T1-T18 complete.

data.title: Vendor ngmd graph/STTC/network code into the package
data.rationale: Ported ngmd (Rodrigo C. G. Pena, ceda-unibas, BSD-3) graph/STTC/network analysis into basic_analysis/analysis (graphs.py, sttc.py), removing the editable external dependency; credited in NOTICE + README.

data.title: Migrate binarize2pcalcium preprocessing into the package
data.rationale: Calcium preprocessing (binarization / dF/F) migrated from the external binarize2pcalcium repo into basic_analysis/preprocessing/.

data.title: Migrate SERBRA movement-state + kinematics into basic-analysis
data.rationale: Ported movement-state detector + kinematics from SERBRA into basic_analysis (signal_processing, utils, analysis/kinematics, behavior_coupling.movement_state); excluded spatial/stimulus functions as irrelevant to the darkness/no-task paradigm. merged_velocity.npy is m/s.

data.title: Master HDF5 store is the single source of truth (no CSVs)
data.rationale: All analysis output consolidated behind one HDF5 layout seam (app/services/h5_paths.resolve_group); pipeline/video/metadata CSVs removed; batch writes go through a staging->merge queue with a reentrant cross-process write lock (basic_analysis/io/hdf5_lock.py) to avoid batch/web write contention.

data.title: Classical computer vision for video behavior extraction
data.rationale: OpenCV over scikit-image (hardware decode, MOG2, contour/ellipse); Otsu bright-pupil threshold over deep learning (IR pupil is the brightest blob); MOG2 over DeepLabCut (zero training data).

data.title: Native Web Components for the UI (no bundler)
data.rationale: UI built from native Web Components (ba-header/ba-filter/ba-help/ba-run-panel/ba-palette...) hosted by a thin Jinja base.html; dataset selection persisted in localStorage; no build step.

data.title: 5-phase intrinsic CA3-in-darkness pipeline overhaul
data.rationale: 2026-07-08 plan (branch refactor): (1) config translator seam + config page; (2) versioned fluorescence pipeline raw->binarize->dF/F->z-score + suite2p orchestration + store rebuild; (3) video twitch + ROI correction; (4) analysis rerun + significance framework + longitudinal benchmark; (5) addons: population geometry/tangling, topology/Betti, Bayesian+XGBoost decoders, coupling, drift.

data.statement: Never delete stat.npy or other raw/derived data files; HDF5 cell-metadata caching is additive only.

Every analysis and plot must ship a '?' help affordance (help_algorithm/help_shows/docs_url) AND a docs page in the same change; enforced by tests/test_app_help_registry.py and mkdocs --strict. (AGENTS.md rule 4)
Aim for >95% test coverage per file; Ruff (rules E,F,I,W, line-length 100) must be clean before done.
Report mutual information in bits, not nats (divide KSG/KNN estimates by ln 2) to stay consistent with the binned estimator.

data.name: Test invocation bypassing hardcoded --cov
data.example: pyproject addopts hardcodes --cov, so run: .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -q -o addopts="" (NUMBA_DISABLE_JIT=1 set in conftest so njit kernels are line-traced). Full suite ~3629 tests, ~18 min.

data.name: Outlier QC via Tukey outer fence
data.example: Flag outlier cells/neurons with Tukey's outer fence (Q3 + 3.0*IQR) on per-neuron metrics into outlier_rois.csv; flag, never silently drop.

data.name: Publication figure defaults
data.example: SciencePlots no-latex, 8pt sans-serif font, 300 DPI PDF output, colorblind-friendly palette.

data.name: Lint with plain ruff check
data.example: Use `ruff check <files>` (pyproject ignores E501); passing an explicit --select E,F,I,W overrides the ignore list and reintroduces E501 line-length noise.

data.name: pipeline/ drives IO, analysis/ computes
data.example: basic_analysis/pipeline/*.py are thin IO-bound drivers that load from + save to the master HDF5; basic_analysis/analysis/*.py hold the algorithms with no IO.

data.name: Windows dev environment notes
data.example: Use pwsh.exe; YAML paths use backslashes; the F: network data drive is slow for I/O.

data.name: Flask web dashboard
data.location: app/ blueprints (core, neural, behavior, video_analyzer, maxent, running, config); services (analysis_registry, result_store, analysis_runner, job_queue). 4-card dashboard + generic run->HDF5->auto-load lifecycle.

data.name: Master HDF5 store
data.location: basic_analysis/io/{master_hdf5,video_store,hdf5_lock}.py; app/services/{result_store,store_merge,auto_merge,staging}.py. Reentrant cross-process write lock; staging->merge queue.

data.name: Video behavior pipeline
data.location: basic_analysis/video/ — pupil (Otsu bright-pupil + ellipse fit), paw (MOG2 / GPU tracker); planned myoclonic-twitch detection from motion energy.

data.name: Analysis algorithms package
data.location: basic_analysis/analysis/ — graphs, sttc, maxent, decoding/decoders, assemblies, sequences, registration, spatial_qc, clustering, place_cells, grid_cells, comparison, behavior_coupling, behavior_states, kinematics.

data.name: Batch engine + CLI
data.location: basic_analysis/analysis/batch.py (Click) — run as `python -m basic_analysis.analysis.batch <subcommand>` (degree-distributions, laplacian-spectra, network-summaries, sttc, trace-statistics, population-rates...).

data.name: Config single-source + validation
data.location: configs/pipeline.yaml (single source); basic_analysis/config.py; app/services/{config_schema,config_help,config_store}.py; docs/src/configuration.md is the reference.

data.name: MkDocs documentation
data.location: docs/src (Material for MkDocs); mkdocs build --strict is a gate; every analysis has a docs_url page.

data.title: Execute the 2026-07-08 intrinsic-analysis-overhaul (5 phases) on branch refactor
Build/port the suite2p per-subsession runner (currently absent; only loading/binarization/dF/F/QC migrated)
Implement immobility-gated myoclonic-twitch detection from IR-video motion energy

data.statement: No compute function reads a raw nested YAML path; all config access goes through the translator seam (config/translate.py), which mirrors app/services/h5_paths.py::resolve_group as one mapping table.

Every analysis is saved AND loaded keyed to the fluorescence-pipeline version (fluor_version) it consumed; analyses run on any fluor version via Session.load_event_traces and metrics not comparable across versions are flagged.
The master HDF5 gives every animal/date/subsession its own isolated space with no spillover — no merged-fluorescence-in-place-of-split-data (the current defect being fixed).
